package repository

import "context"

// LoginLogsRepository is a draft repository boundary for loginLogs.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type LoginLogsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query LoginLogsQuery) ([]LoginLog, error)
}

type LoginLogsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string

}
